question: What color is the ring worn on the person's finger throughout the video? A. Black B. Gold C. White D. Grey
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand wearing a gold ring seasons four raw pork chops arranged on a wooden cutting board using salt and a black pepper grinder. Raw meat pieces are placed into a grey speckled frying pan sitting on a white portable stove. A spoon scoops a yellow block of butter from a white bowl into the pan.

question: How many raw meat chops are visible in the frying pan?

On what surface is the rectangular wooden cutting board resting during the meat preparation scenes?
options: C. inside grey speckled frying pan

question: What action is the person performing in the later segment of the video? A. Placing meat B. Stirring mushrooms C. Heating pan D. Seasoning meat
Describe the sequence of preparation and cooking steps shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand places raw meat cuts into a grey speckled frying pan on a stove; at 6s, hands sprinkle seasoning onto four pork chops arranged on a wooden cutting board; at 10s, a black pepper grinder is used to season the top right chop; at 18s, a spoon scoops butter from a white bowl into the frying pan.

A piece of butter was scooped from a white bowl and placed into the pan C. A hand pressed down on the raw meat chops on the cutting board D. Black pepper was ground onto the pork chops using a grinder
The mushroom sauce is being stirred in the pan — what happens to the seared meat that was cooked earlier?
canonical_answer: The seared meat cutlet is lowered into the mushroom sauce using yellow tongs.
